## Guilherme Ferreira

![](https://img.shields.io/badge/-%23000000.svg?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white)
Bachelor in Software Engineering student at University of Minho, Portugal.
<br>
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/-%23000000.svg?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white)
Passionate about systems programming and aquainted with web-development, Nix, and general.
<br>
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/-%23000000.svg?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white)
I love game development and exploring new tech.I love game development and exploring new tech.
<br>
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/-%23000000.svg?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white)
Formerly a Frontend Web Developer Intern at Yari Labs (Jun 2025 - Jul 2025), architecting vendor dashboards using Vue.js and TypeScript.
<br>
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/-%23000000.svg?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white)
Champion at CoderDojo Braga and Organizer of CoderCamp, blending technical curriculum with soft-skills activities.
<br>
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/-%23000000.svg?style=flat&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white) Co-Director of the Social Dept & Tech Contributor at CeSIUM, empowering students and contributing to tools used by 800+ peers.
